title: Dashboard Session Send Turn
objective: Create a dashboard session, send a user message through Gateway `sessions.send`, and wait for final assistant text in chat history.

phases.title: Provision Dashboard Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before sending a dashboard session message.

phases.title: Dashboard Session Message
phases.intent: Exercise Gateway `sessions.send` and verify the final assistant response is present in chat history.
commands: ocm @{env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/run-dashboard-session-send-turn.mjs --session-key kova-dashboard-session-send --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --expected-text KOVA_AGENT_OK --timeout 120000

phases.title: Post-Dashboard Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the dashboard-style message turn.
